---
name: bootstrap-legacy-kb
description: Create or populate a KB feature folder from legacy code analysis so the feature can enter the normal SDLC flow.
argument-hint: A target feature name, feature folder, or legacy code area.
---

Use the legacy-code-scanner and kb-bootstrapper skills to create or complete the feature artifacts for the target area. Use draft legacy-oriented frontmatter, preserve uncertainty as open questions, and validate the result with the KB validator script.
